title: Fix missing scrollbar on the press kit page

requirements.text: Fix the PressKitPage so that the page is fully scrollable and a scrollbar is visible/accessible. Ensure the root container and any parent elements on the /press-kit route do not have overflow:hidden, overflow:clip, or any other CSS that suppresses scrolling. The page body and root container must allow vertical scroll so users can reach all sections (logo, video, about, game details, features, screenshots, download button, socials, press email).

quotes: there is no scroll bar on the press kit website

acceptanceCriteria: The /press-kit page is vertically scrollable and all sections are reachable by scrolling.
A scrollbar appears on the press kit page when content overflows the viewport height.
No CSS rule on the page root, body, or any wrapping container suppresses vertical overflow on the press kit route.
Scrolling behavior is unaffected on the landing page (/) and admin (/admin) routes.

constraints: Do not change any content, text, or section order on the PressKitPage.
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or layout of any section on the press kit page.
Modifying the backend or any data-fetching logic.
Altering scrollbar appearance or custom styling beyond restoring default browser scrollbar behavior.
